context.audience: Web developers responsible for SEO performance, startup CTOs whose sites need organic traffic, frontend engineers building SEO-friendly single-page and server-rendered applications
pain_points: Server-side rendering and static generation decisions for SEO
Structured data markup implementation that produces rich search results
Core Web Vitals optimization for framework-based applications
Crawl budget management for large sites with dynamic content
JavaScript rendering and SEO for SPA and hybrid applications
subtopics: Meta tag and OG image optimization
